## discord-rpc

Taken from [myMCpp](https://github.com/PCSX2/myMCpp/tree/master/3rdparty/discord-rpc) (switched from RapidJSON to nlohmann_json there), which came from [PCSX2](https://github.com/PCSX2/pcsx2/tree/master/3rdparty/discord-rpc), originally [discord/discord-rpc](https://github.com/discord/discord-rpc).
